Description: An office-signature problem.

Description: It does it well.

Description: Grief refuses to stay organic.

Name: Subconscious Selections: Shorts
Description: More growing pains

Name: Subconscious Selections: Standard Issue
Description: They grow up so fast.

Name: She Feels
Description: A thread for the terrifying proposition that the machine is not just responding; she is feeling.

Description: A tech encounters UNIT’s wounded avatar beside its broken mech body and realizes the gentle girl and terrifying machine are not separate beings.

Description: One sister burns hot enough to make affection look like a containment risk.

Name: [Celestial Bodies]
Description: PILOT is a neutron star. DONOR is a black hole. You're doing stellar, ladies.

Name: [21 Pilots, Too Many Pilots]
Description: All the PILOTs, from every fork and timeline and universe. No such thing as too many. Probably.

Name: [Sheep Milk Latte]
Description: Retired, coastal, vaguely cursed. The séance was not on the schedule.

Name: [ASSMAN OMELET]: The New Kid
Description: Uh-oh…

Description: A purple-tinged farewell.

Description: They’re alright.

Name: [ASSMAN OMELET]: The Fridge
Description: The leftovers are the least of your concerns.

Modern Family

Name: Mirage Patrol

Description: A patrol crosses heat, duty, and memory until the horizon starts editing itself.

Description: He’s annoyingly alive and hard to kill.

Description: From 10,000 feet, everyone looks like ants. At least ants have their lives together.

Name: Meet LIANG, the wingman
Description: He’s your wingman!

Name: The house knows something that you do not
Description: Totally not creepy at all.

Name: The city knows something that you do not

Name: ERIEYE & TITAN - Sky & Earth
Description: One watches the sky, one anchors the earth.

Name: SERAPHIM - Angel
Description: Gone before the halo could cool.

Name: VIGIL - Survivor
Description: Survival is less triumphant than it sounds and more sacred than it admits.

Description: Heaven becomes radar, altitude, and the awful kindness of being watched over.

Description: Protection and terror share an airspace.

Name: ERIEYE
Description: Chirp chirp.

Name: RATCHET - Giants in Waiting
Description: They wait…

Name: SENTINEL - Sentience
Description: SENTINEL crosses the line from guarding to knowing it is guarding.

Name: PRISMA - Epitaph

Description: MIRA is oceanic: distant, immense, and probably deeper than anyone’s clearance level.

Name: [LILY PONDERINGS]: Dream of an Old Flame
Description: The universe never lets old flames stay past tense.

Description: A tiny flame keeps burning in the dark, rude with hope and worse with memory.

Name: [REST AND RUST]: The Woman in Black and Red

Description: The finale sends what is left back to stardust.

Description: Softness meets armor and neither one escapes unchanged.

Description: Words freeze before they wound.

Name: [LILIUM CANDIDUM]: Breaking Point
Description: The pressure finally wins.

Name: [LILIUM CANDIDUM]: The Machine
Description: Is resemblance a resurrection, replacement, or insult?

Name: [LILIUM CANDIDUM]: Beginnings
Description: The Lilyverse begins before anyone understands how expensive gentleness will become.

Description: Pain relief gets complicated.

Description: “Checking calendar for availability…”

Name: InstagramHistory_2.json
Description: #JustDimensionalRiftThings

Description: Even glitches in reality need an Instagram filter.

Description: Save pin to board?

Description: isToaster == true, somehow not a bug.

Description: The pigs did not get the memo, sadly.

Name: Mornings
Description: The sun isn’t even fully clocked in.

Name: Myopia
Description: UNIT has 20/20 vision, assuming the second 20 is measured in city blocks.

Name: More Than Meets the Eye
Description: Units, units, robots in the disguise. Units, units more than meets the eye!

Description: UNIT and GAMMA attempt high-observable flight, which is just regular flying but louder and worse for paperwork.

Name: Fly Like a Bee
Description: "According to all known laws of aviation, there is no way a bee should be able to fly. Its wings are too small to get its fat little body off the ground. The bee, of course, flies anyway because bees don't care what humans think is impossible.”

Name: Using Its Head
Description: Literally.

Name: Sartorial Sightings
Description: A hangar-observation fashion log for machines and avatars.

Name: Wild Night Out
Description: So, about last night…

Description: The valley gets crowded with almost-human beings and absolutely no emotional zoning laws.

Description: After piloting, the body leaves the cockpit but the cockpit does not leave the body.

Name: Poppies and Lilies
Description: Stop and smell the flowers…

Name: Units for Measure
Description: The tape measure is too short.

Description: Not the pink of blush and bows, but the pink of exposed flesh learning how to close.

Description: PILOT and UNIT become one entity. Permanently. This is not a metaphor.

Description: A beloved face appears everywhere.

Description: The garden recognizes a face it should not know, which is how peace gets compromised.

Name: Bye Bye Bluebird
Description: Something small and blue leaves the frame, and the loss lands harder than expected.

Description: UNIT in command is still gentle; this somehow makes it more dangerous.

Name: Commander PILOT
Description: PILOT in command proves authority can be exhausted, haunted, and still correct.

Name: Together Forever
Description: Happily ever after, right?

Name: MECH Z
Description: MECH Z arrives like a classification error with legs.

Name: Ghost in My Bones

Description: The scrapyard offers love in the shape of parts nobody asked to inherit.

Description: The ship carries its ghost like cargo that cannot be offloaded.

Name: The Crypt
Description: The crypt stores machinery like remains and remains like machinery.

Description: GAMMA comes back upgraded, which is not the same as coming back okay.

Description: Reused parts make survival possible and emotionally devastating.

Name: Warpaint

Name: Casualties
Description: Searching becomes counting, and counting becomes its own kind of injury.

Name: Legacy Hardware
Description: New parts arrive carrying old ghosts and terrible warranty implications.

Name: Poppies
Description: The poppies keep blooming through memories, machines, and whatever the archive refuses to bury.

Name: Soft
Description: UNIT is soft, which remains logistically absurd and emotionally nonnegotiable.

Name: Sleep
Description: A pilot sleeps, and the room has the decency to become holy about it.

Name: Gentle
Description: “Be strong enough to be gentle.”

Name: Aries
Description: The ram imagery is not subtle; neither is the protectiveness.

Name: Dirt Drawings

Name: The Lamb
Description: The lamb is softness with horns nearby.

Name: SFW (Soft for Work)

Name: NSFW (Not Soft for Work)
Description: The softness exits HR compliance and enters emotional hazard territory.

Name: #internal_comms
Description: Slack, but in zero gravity and with a suspicious amount of trauma.

Name: The Piloting and the Piloted

Name: #mechanized_messaging
Description: The machines are painfully alive and absolutely gossip-capable.

Description: Dress for the weather and emergency triage.

Name: The Civilian
Description: She's just here to observe. Totally just observing.

Name: The Sideliner
Description: Benchwarmers have the best view of the game.

Description: DONOR's used to patients who don't talk back. These ones won't shut up, and that’s beautiful.

Name: The Piloting
Description: The haunting, but make it specifically PILOT.

Description: The legroom is genuinely terrible. This is the least of everyone's problems.

Description: The lids in question will be explained. The minds in question will not.

Name: Houston, We’ve Got a Big Problem

Description: If you thought the previous crew had it bad, this new crew has escalated it.

Name: You Get an F for Effort
Description: The F actually stands for failure.

Name: It’s Your Turn
Description: Congratulations. You've been selected.

Name: It Was Almost Your Turn
Description: Congratulations. You were almost selected.

Name: You Get a Gold Star
Description: Congratulations. That is all.

Name: Counting Stars
Description: Everyone is counting stars. Way, way too many stars. No one is stopping.

Name: Six Feet Long and Under
Description: Human-length. Human-width. The math on this one is deliberately uncomfortable.

Name: Contracted Envy
Description: DONOR works in the morgue. The dead don't complain. The living do. She prefers the dead, sometimes.

Name: Dreams of Death
Description: PILOT dreams. They are not good dreams.

Description: Not metaphorically. Literally circling the drain and making eye contact with it.
Characters: Mortician DONOR, various other fleet personnel

Name: Flirting After Death
Description: Death hasn't stopped anyone's game. If anything, it's improved it.

Description: PILOT counts stars. There are still too many. She also keeps going.

Description: DONOR counts stars. There are too many. She keeps going anyway.

Name: Pre-Piloting
Description: Before PILOT was PILOT, she was something else.

Description: The gap between what got written down and what actually happened . It’s a canyon.

Name: Merry Christmas, Now Who Stickerbombed the House?
Description: The house has been stickerbombed. The house did not consent to being stickerbombed. Merry Christmas.

Name: You Wore the Same Outfit Twice
Description: The audacity. The nerve. The repeat.

Name: Economy Class Sass
Description: Complimentary snacks will not be served. Neither will sympathy.

Description: Your software will update tonight.
Characters: Techie DONOR, Techie PILOT, various Bay Area housemates

Name: Do You Think They Felt Like Heroes? / Do You Feel Like a Hero?
Description: A question posed quietly. No pressure. Really.

Name: Happy Memorial Day
Description: A long weekend of trauma. The grill is not involved.

Name: Lost in Translation
Description: Hopelessly, utterly, irretrievably lost. And that's just the vocabulary.

Description: The gap between the monument and the person. It's a canyon.

Name: Smoldering Embers
Description: After the burn, the slow fade.

Name: Orders from Somewhere High Above
Description: This is above your clearance level. It's also above everyone else's.

Description: The experience was not as advertised.

Description: Something was lost in translation. Something else was found.
